query:
SELECT st.id, st.name, st.type, st.targetCount, st.isActive, COUNT(q.id) as num_preguntas
FROM survey_templates st
LEFT JOIN questions q ON q.templateId = st.id
GROUP BY st.id, st.name, st.type, st.targetCount, st.isActive;
